titleStmt.title: SII 39.124: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 124. (A.R. No. 124 of 1916.) ETTIYĀTTALI, ARANTANGI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. AGASTYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL •••••••••• ŚAKA [13]63 (1441 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription registers a gift of kāṇiyāṭchi of some land by of Arantāṅgi Aḻagiya maṇavāḻapperumāḷ to a Meṉṉiṉṟaperumāḷ for performing certain services in the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cakāttam [100 6 10 3] ṉmel cellā niṉṟa tuṉmati varuṣam puraṭṭāti ø 21 § Aṟantāṅki Aracu
Uṭaiyār Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ toṇṭaimāṉār meṉṉiṉṟa perumāḷukku nām vaṭaveḷḷāṟāṉa
cuntarapāṇṭiyavaḷaṉāṭṭu māṅkuṭi veḷḷāḷar pakkal koṇṭu kalveṭṭi kuṭutta Ariya piḷavaṉ periyaperumāḷ
pakkal koṇṭa paṭṭaṉ vayakkal rūpāy Orumā nālumā kaṇṇi vayakkal rūpāy Orumā nālumā tamiḻnāṭaṉ vayakkal rūpāy 1 kurukkatticcey
rūpāy Orumā Antari vayakkal rūpāy- 2 10 Āka rūpāy- (1/4) 2 10 piḷḷaiyār piṟavikku nallār pakkal koṇṭa vayakkal rūpāy Orumānālumā
kumāraccey rūpāy-cu Āka rūpāy Iraṇṭumām Ūṟpotuvāṉa piḷḷaiyār periyaperumāḷum Ariya piḷḷai periyaperumā
ḷum Uyyāṇṭār pāṇṭiperumāḷum tirucciṟṟampalam Uṭaiyār Āḷḷuṭaiyārum Ivarkaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭār
pakkal koṇṭa tiruvakatti vayakkal rūpāy pacu piccivayakkal rūpāy Orumā Āka rūpāy 2 10 6 Āka Eṟṟaccurukm Uṭpaṭa rūpāy
10 1mā nālumā Iṉṉilam patioru māmukkāṇiyum Iṟaiyiliyāka kaḻittu kuṭuttu Iṉṉilattukku veṭṭimuṭ
ṭu kaṭamai viṉipokammāka kalam Eppeṟpaṭṭa camuttapiṟāttiyum kaḻittu ṉāyanār tiruvakatticuramuṭaiyar
kku māttāl Añcu marakkāl nellu kuṭukka kaṟpittu kuṭutta Aḷavukku Imariyātiyile kuṭuttu yiṉṉilam
patuorumā mukkaāṇiyum meṉṉiṉṟa perumāḷ cantirātittavarai kāṇiyācciyāka paṟṟi yaṉupavittup potakkaṭavarāka
vum Itukku Ahitam ninaittavan gaṅkaikaraiyile brāhmaṇaṟaiyum kapilaiyum koṉṟa pāvattai peṟuvarākavum
Uṭaiyavar Aruḷicceyaṟpaṭikku tiruccāṟṟaṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
